# Veyra

> Commit mode for production AI agent actions.

## Install

npm install @veyrahq/sdk-node

## Links

- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@veyrahq/sdk-node
- Repo: https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra
- Website: https://veyra.to
- API: https://api.veyra.to

## Endpoints

- Capability: https://api.veyra.to/v1/capability
- Verify token: https://api.veyra.to/v1/verify-token
- Authorize action: https://api.veyra.to/v1/authorize-action
- Trust status: https://api.veyra.to/v1/trust-status/:domain
- Submit receipt: https://api.veyra.to/v1/submit-receipt
- Settle action: https://api.veyra.to/v1/settle-action
- Billing usage: https://api.veyra.to/v1/billing/usage

## Quick integration patterns

- commitAwareFetch(url, init, options) — drop-in fetch replacement with automatic commit mode
- requireTrustedWrite() — Express/Fastify middleware to protect write endpoints

## Commit transition grammar

currentMode = open
requiredMode = commit
transitionStrategy = authorize_then_retry_with_x_veyra_token
states = open, pre-commit, commit

## Example

https://github.com/Aquariosan/veyra/tree/main/examples/generic-fetch-wrapper

## Pricing

Free to discover. Free to verify. Paid only when a productive action settles.

Class A (low-risk): 0.005 EUR/action
Class B (medium): 0.02 EUR/action
Class C (high-risk): 0.10 EUR/action
Class D (cross-org): 0.25 EUR/action

## Reference patterns

- tool-builder: protect write endpoints with requireTrustedWrite()
- agent-developer: use commitAwareFetch() or handleCommitRequired()
- protected-write-middleware: requireTrustedWrite({ verifyEndpoint })
- one-call-automation: commitAwareFetch(url, init, { apiKey, agentId, actionType, target })

## Auth

- Trust status, verify token, capability: public, no key needed
- Authorize, receipt, settle, billing: require X-API-Key header

## Token header

X-Veyra-Token
